feed.title: JARMlab
feed.subtitle: Lab website under construction. Hope to see you again.

entry.title: Welcome to the new JARM Lab Website!

link.title: Welcome to the new JARM Lab Website!

entry.content: We are officially migrating our website from Weebly over to GitHub Pages. Stay tuned for exciting research updates, publication announcements, and open positions in the lab!
entry.summary: We are officially migrating our website from Weebly over to GitHub Pages. Stay tuned for exciting research updates, publication announcements, and open positions in the lab!
